title: Proper Staffing Ratios
description: Day shift has 8 inspectors for production, with experience averaging 15 years.

title: Optimal Lighting Levels
description: Consistent 800 lux lighting throughout the inspection area, matching industry standards.

title: Sustainable Production Pace
description: Day shift maintains a 100% pace baseline without rushing, allowing time for thorough inspection.

title: Peer Review Process
description: Critical components go through a second inspection by a senior inspector before shipment.
